name: multi-search-engine
description: URL template config for 16 search engines (7 CN + 9 Global); the {keyword} placeholder is automatically injected by find-script/scripts/search.sh with type-specific keywords (剧本 / script / filetype:pdf). Provides advanced search operators (site/filetype/intitle), time filters, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. Auto-loaded as a submodule of find-script/; falls back to find-script's built-in 16-engine config if missing. No API keys required.
author: multi-search-engine team
purpose: Provide find-script with 16-engine URL config + CN/Global search-strategy docs + advanced-operators reference

contract.placeholder_substitution: Handled by find-script's inject_type_keyword() (auto-injects type-specific keywords)

scripts.note: This submodule is a pure config + docs type skill with no executable scripts of its own. Actual fetching/scheduling is handled by find-script/scripts/search.sh.

tests.coverage: 16-engine config completeness / URL templates / {keyword} contract / find-script integration

changes: Fixed corrupted metadata.json (previously had file-metadata wrapper; replaced with standard skill metadata)
Completed SKILL.md frontmatter: added version 2.2.0 / tags / icon / author / license / schema_version / category / subcategory
Extended _meta.json: added display / capabilities / engines_count / engines_breakdown / scripts / tests
Added priority / language fields to config.json for alignment with find-script/config.json
Added tests/test_smoke.sh (18 tests: URL validity, {keyword} contract, region distribution, find-script integration)
Documented integration contract: {keyword} placeholder is injected by find-script's inject_type_keyword()
Fully backward-compatible with find-script: 3-level fallback chain (submodule → local → built-in) unchanged
Initial release with 8 domestic search engines

security_checks.command_execution_risk: low (no script execution; URL templates handled by consumer)
security_checks.network_data_exfiltration: pass (URL templates contain no tracking params)
security_checks.remote_script_execution: pass (only provides URL templates; no JavaScript)
security_checks.copyright_compliance: pass (complies with each search engine's ToS; recommends 1-2 second delays)
